Off Calendar Oct-20-2023 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion For Voluntary Dismissal Of Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Aug-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARILYN J. CLARK LIVING TRUST's Unopposed Motion For Voluntary Dismissal Of Action Without Prejudice.

Plaintiff's "unopposed motion for voluntary dismissal of action without prejudice" is granted.

Order is signed.
